def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    
    # Calculate support/resistance levels using recent pivots
    window = params['pivot_window']
    df['pivot_high'] = df['high'].rolling(window).max()
    df['pivot_low'] = df['low'].rolling(window).min()
    
    # Calculate distance from pivots
    df['dist_from_high'] = (df['close'] - df['pivot_high']) / df['pivot_high']
    df['dist_from_low'] = (df['close'] - df['pivot_low']) / df['pivot_low']
    
    # Generate signals
    signals = np.where(
        (df['dist_from_low'] < params['support_threshold']) & 
        (ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=params['rsi_window']) < params['rsi_threshold']),
        1,  # Long at support with oversold RSI
        np.where(
            (df['dist_from_high'] > params['resistance_threshold']) & 
            (ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=params['rsi_window']) > 100 - params['rsi_threshold']),
            -1,  # Short at resistance with overbought RSI
            0    # Neutral
        )
    )
    
    return pd.Series(signals, index=df.index).astype(int)
rationale: EUR/GBP exhibits strong support/resistance behavior with mean-reverting tendencies when price approaches key pivot levels combined with RSI confirmation.
